title: Bar Bigha heat wave
lead: Bar Bigha is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.66. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Bar Bigha are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 18.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 53%, while the wind speed is 16.6 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to persist, with no significant change in the temperature forecast, leading to increased energy consumption and health risks.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
